usageLimit.resetAt: Usage limit reached. Your limit will reset at **{{time}} {{timezone}}** - {{date}}

descriptions.default: Workspace-write sandbox with approval prompts for untrusted commands.
descriptions.acceptEdits: All commands run automatically within the workspace. Full auto mode with sandboxed execution.
descriptions.bypassPermissions: Full system access with no restrictions. All commands run automatically with full disk and network access. Use with caution.
descriptions.plan: Planning mode - no commands are executed

input.clipboardImageReadFailed: Failed to read the clipboard image

hintText.ctrlEnter: Ctrl+Enter to send • Shift+Enter for new line

handoff.activeWarning: Warning: this legacy session is still active. Waiting is safest; forced takeover may leave the original terminal running.
handoff.unknownWarning: Warning: Ozw cannot verify whether this legacy session is still running. Check the original terminal or explicitly accept the risk.
handoff.forceConfirm: Force takeover? Ozw will keep this card ID and create a new shared session without stopping the original terminal.
